headline: ThreatDown Strengthens Executive Team with Chief Financial Officer and Vice President of Marketing Appointments
summary: SANTA CLARA, Calif., May 06, 2026--ThreatDown, the former corporate business unit of Malwarebytes, today announced Chung Ip as Chief Financial Officer and Lisa O’Reilly as Vice President of Marketing. The hires support the company’s channel-first growth strategy and focus on the mid-market and managed service provider (MSP) segments.

raw.headline: ThreatDown Strengthens Executive Team with Chief Financial Officer and Vice President of Marketing Appointments

headline: TotalEnergies Pens AI Supercomputer Deal With Nvidia & Dell
summary: TotalEnergies unveiled new AI-powered Pangea 5 supercomputer project. Partnership with NVIDIA and Dell boosts computing capacity sixfold.

raw.headline: TotalEnergies Pens AI Supercomputer Deal With Nvidia & Dell
raw.summary: TotalEnergies unveiled new AI-powered Pangea 5 supercomputer project. Partnership with NVIDIA and Dell boosts computing capacity sixfold.

headline: TotalEnergies Develops Pangea 5, a Next-Generation Supercomputer That Will Increase its Computing Power Sixfold
summary: PARIS, May 06, 2026--TotalEnergies (Paris:TTE) (LSE:TTE) (NYSE:TTE), in collaboration with Dell Technologies and NVIDIA, announces the signing of a contract for the design and installation of Pangea 5, its next high-performance supercomputer. Hosted at the Jean Féger Scientific and Technical Center (CSTJF) in Pau, in the South of France, Pangea 5 will multiply the Company’s computing power by six. It represents an investment of over 100 million euros.

raw.headline: TotalEnergies Develops Pangea 5, a Next-Generation Supercomputer That Will Increase its Computing Power Sixfold
raw.summary: PARIS, May 06, 2026--TotalEnergies (Paris:TTE) (LSE:TTE) (NYSE:TTE), in collaboration with Dell Technologies and NVIDIA, announces the signing of a contract for the design and installation of Pangea 5, its next high-performance supercomputer. Hosted at the Jean Féger Scientific and Technical Center (CSTJF) in Pau, in the South of France, Pangea 5 will multiply the Company’s computing power by six. It represents an investment of over 100 million euros.
